sdkPRs.title: No SDK PR found for JavaScript

insights.description: 3.84-day gap between spec PR merge (2026-03-13) and first SDK PR creation (Mar 17) — automated pipeline took 3.84 days to trigger.
1.6-day wait for first human review on spec PR — hardikginwala opened 2026-03-12, first review came Mar 13.
All 4 SDK PRs were auto-generated (AutoPR). Java, Go, Python, .NET all came from the automated pipeline.
3 SDK PR(s) still open: Java, Go, Python. Only 1 merged so far (.NET).
No SDK PR found for: JavaScript.
21 MCP tool calls tracked for .NET SDK development — build/test/check cycles from Visual Studio Code.
.NET SDK PR had 14 human-authored commits (by Asif Mammadov, asmdv) — significant manual work on the auto-generated PR.
Spec PR merged quickly in 1.78 days — efficient review turnaround.
